title: Eat everything
body: ### The mod requries [Default Components](https://modrinth.com/mod/default-components) for versions 1.2.0 and newer Turns most items into food, never again you will have hunger problems when going to the mines, you can just eat some diamonds! **Some items may not be eatable due to having special interactions, like bows, boats, spawn eggs, buckets, shields, etc.** This is a vanilla limitation
